2606.24501.title: UOL@IDEM at BEA 2026 Shared Task 1: Neural Fusion and Feature-Rich Modeling for L1-Aware Vocabulary Difficulty Prediction
2606.24501.paper_summary: This paper describes UOL@IDEM's closed-track submission to the BEA 2026 shared task on L1-aware vocabulary difficulty prediction. We model the task as regression and train separate systems for Spanish, German, and Mandarin Chinese\footnote{Below we use \emph{Chinese} for brevity.}. Our system combines multilingual contextual representations with engineered features capturing frequency, surface form, retrieval evidence, semantic alignment, cognate similarity, and masked-language-model predictability. Development results show consistent gains over the official closed-track baselines, with sentence-embedding encoders such as BGE-M3, multilingual E5, and LaBSE performing best. Official submissions achieve RMSE scores of 1.132, 1.037, and 0.891 for Spanish, German, and Chinese, respectively. Feature analysis identifies frequency as the most stable predictor, while contextual predictability, form similarity, retrieval, and semantic features provide complementary L1-sensitive signals. Error analysis shows strong ranking performance but weaker calibration for the easiest items, which are often overpredicted. See https://github.com/Nouran-Khallaf/UoL-IDEM-BEA2026-Vocabulary-Difficulty-Prediction
2606.24501.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文描述了UOL@IDEM在BEA 2026共享任務中針對L1-aware詞彙難度預測的封閉賽道提交。<lb/>我們將這個任務建模為回歸，並為西班牙語、德語和普通話訓練了不同的系統\footnote{為了簡潔起見，以下我們使用\emph{Chinese}。}。<lb/>我們的系統結合了多語言上下文表示和工程特徵，捕捉頻率、表面形式、檢索證據、語義對齊、同源詞相似度和掩碼語言模型的可預測性。<lb/>開發結果顯示，與官方封閉賽道基準相比，系統穩定地獲得了提升，句子嵌入編碼器如BGE-M3、多語言E5和LaBSE表現最佳。<lb/>官方提交的西班牙語、德語和中文的RMSE得分分別為1.132、1.037和0.891。<lb/>特徵分析顯示頻率是最穩定的預測因子，而上下文可預測性、形式相似度、檢索和語義特徵則提供了互補的L1敏感信號。<lb/>錯誤分析顯示排名表現強勁，但對於最簡單的項目校準較弱，這些項目往往被過度預測。<lb/>請參見 https://github.com/Nouran-Khallaf/UoL-IDEM-BEA2026-Vocabulary-Difficulty-Prediction
2606.24501.author: Nouran Khallaf et.al.
